result.stdout:
HttpRequestInspector: HTTP Request Inspector Usage: HttpRequestInspector [options] Options: -p, --port

The port to listen on. Default is 5000. -u, --unsecure Accept HTTP requests instead of HTTPS. -s, --response-status-code The HTTP status code to be returned when called. Default is 200. --version Display version information
